arts.ttl: Gosens’ journey: From Inter struggles to Fiorentina revival
arts.sum: Robin Gosens’ move to Inter Milan in January 2022 seemed like the perfect stepping stone for his career. Despite his declining form at Atalanta, many believed he would be an incredible reinforcement for Simone Inzaghi’s left flank. However, the German player never managed to become a key figure at Inter, except for a few sporadic appearances. Calciomercato detail how Gosens, now a pillar at Fiorentina after a season in Germany with Union Berlin, has shed light on his unsuccessful stint in Milan. “I asked myself many times what went wrong.
